ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Intensity of vignette's dimming effect. Set to 0 to turn vignetting off.
ast.target: 暗角效果的强度。设置为0可关闭暗角效果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how close to the screen's center vignetting spreads from both sides of the screen, as linear gradients.
ast.target: 确定暗角效果从屏幕两侧向屏幕中心扩散的接近程度，以线性渐变形式呈现。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how close to the screen's center vignetting spreads from borders of the screen, as a radial gradient.
ast.target: 确定暗角效果从屏幕边缘向屏幕中心扩散的接近程度，以径向渐变形式呈现。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The duration (in seconds) of fade-in animation on entering Zen mode
ast.target: 进入禅模式时淡入动画的持续时间（秒）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the tab's header in Zen mode
ast.target: 在禅模式下显示标签页的标题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the scrollbar in Zen mode. If it is hidden, scrolling is still available with mousewheel, arrows, touchpad, etc.
ast.target: 在禅模式下显示滚动条。如果隐藏，仍可通过鼠标滚轮、箭头键、触控板等进行滚动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the graph view's controls in Zen mode
ast.target: 在禅模式下显示图谱视图的控件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Center text content in Zen mode, even if in regular view it takes all of the screen's width (ignore 'Editor -> Readable line length' being off in Zen mode)
ast.target: 在禅模式下居中文本内容，即使在常规视图中它占据了屏幕的全部宽度（在禅模式下忽略“编辑器 -> 可读行长度”设置为关闭的状态）
